description_es: Encuentra usuarios que han hecho órdenes usando una subconsulta.
description_en: Find users who have made orders using a subquery.
initial_script:
-- Usa una subconsulta en WHERE con IN

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders (
  order_id INT,
  user_id INT,
  product STRING,
  amount DOUBLE,
  order_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT name FROM users
WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders);

description_es: Clasifica usuarios en grupos de edad (Joven, Adulto, Senior).
description_en: Classify users into age groups (Young, Adult, Senior).
initial_script:
-- Usa CASE WHEN para crear categorías

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT name, age,
  CASE
    WHEN age < 25 THEN 'Joven'
    WHEN age BETWEEN 25 AND 40 THEN 'Adulto'
    ELSE 'Senior'
  END as age_group
FROM users;
